'''Lan Starburn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] prison guard from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] who guarded in the [[Desolation Alley]] and was also a correctional officer during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for the disruption of a 2 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] smuggling operation out of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Behind the scenes==
Lan Starburn's bounty was 3,000 credits alive and 1,500 credits dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
